examples: Perhaps the grossest thing I've done as a naturalist is to boil animal skulls.
He was a printer by trade and naturalist by avocation.
At nine, his father, a naturalist who had started a reptile park on the Queensland coast, taught him to stalk crocs at night and lug them out of the water.
Carl Strang, a naturalist with DuPage county, says a single acre can produce 1.5m of them.
In 1825, Thomas Henry Huxley, British naturalist and humanist and originator of the word agnostic, born.
